channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Speak
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Kristen Stewart stars in this drama based on the award-winning novel about a teenager traumatized into silence after a disastrous summer party.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Prime
programme.desc: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

programme.title: Playing it Cool
programme.desc: Unrequited love motivates a guy to write about his experiences.

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in – and co-directs – this powerful story of an aging soccer player whose life is crumbling. All he has left is a devoted 12-year old fan – and a desire to live free.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: The Bees
programme.desc: When South American killer bees, corporately smuggled into the United States, mutates into intelligent insects and attacks helpless people, young scientist work desperately to end the threat as the menace swarms in on the city areas.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Guy Royal is a rancher who is metodically taking over the property that lies in a line outside of town.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Chanu, a young Indian from a local reservation has kidnapped Claire Moseley, the daughter of missionary Owen Mosely.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Chris is drinking in a bar in another town when he is arrested by a crooked sheriff and his deputy on a trumped-up charge.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A new Federal marshal drives the seven out of town after a brutal shoot out with a band of thieves. The new lawman's methods are tested when a gang.

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Always the sidekick, Lefty is pushed into the limelight when his best friend and longtime partner is brutally murdered. In efforts to seek revenge, he is placed at odds with vested interests, hired guns, corrupt officials and his own abundant failings.

programme.title: Sky Kids
programme.desc: As a pair of schoolboys sneak a look around an empty private aircraft, two criminals take off with the kids still inside. Upon discovering the men are dangerous gangsters, the horrified lads inadvertently become embroiled in the mobsters's scheme.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Socialite Molly is released from prison after serving a 6-year sentence for the murder of her husband and sets out to prove her innocence with the help of Fran, an investigative reporter who uncovers a conspiracy of silence and a shocking secret.

programme.title: The Spy Gone North
programme.desc: 1993 Korea, the Cold War rages and tensions of the development of nuclear weapons escalate. Seok-young Park, an army major in the South Korea military intelligence is assigned to infiltrate the North Korean nuclear facility but he soon learns a secret.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief (Morgan Freeman) recruits a younger crook (Antonio Banderas) to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Capricorn One
programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.

programme.title: The Encounter
programme.desc: When Collin is discovered naked, disoriented and alone in the forest, he struggles to recount the events of the previous night. His memories return in a series of horrific flashes of what became of his friends and fiancée.

programme.title: Grace and Goliath
programme.desc: Hollywood big-shot Josh Jenkins sweeps into Belfast to make a movie, but before long his world crashes and he loses everything. Hotel cleaner Lily invites him to stay with her family and gradually the people of this 'strange' city touch his heart forever.

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: Timber The Treasure Dog
programme.desc: A local villain is buying up all the ranches where 12-year-old Mickey and his family live, unless they can find a small fortune, they will lose theirs. Luckily, Mickeys dog Timber holds the clue to a legend of buried treasure.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark feels under pressure, and Belinda finds herself up to her neck in cattle mess.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark brings a city to a standstill with his load, and Yogi is on an antiques roadshow.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sharon has to move a copper mountain and Sludge must shift a freight of flammable liquid,

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons: San Pedro Prison, La Paz, Bolivia
programme.desc: Imagine a prison so fierce that guards stay outside for fear of their lives. Inside, the prisoners are in control: murderers, violent offenders, drug bosses. The inmates rule and anarchy prevails. Only the strongest survive this lawless place.

programme.title: Jail: Hysterical Earring
programme.desc: A man is arrested at a popular theme park for public intoxication. A detainee swallows his earring during processing. Officers attempt to restrain a combative woman in custody.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift
programme.desc: A barmaid receives a gift, a music box from a thief, dead ten years. But someone is soon murdered and Colonel March believes the music holds the key.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The New Invisible Man
programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Where the Devil Hides
programme.desc: Terror overtakes a small village when six girls born on the same day mysteriously disappear on their 18th birthday.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disturbing death of a three-year-old girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The discovery of a body in a dumpster leads the CSIs to a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara attempt to solve the mystery behind the miniature crime scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Brass and Catherine handle the case of a San Francisco cop moonlighting as a bodyguard.

programme.title: Scorpion: Young Hearts Spark Fire
programme.desc: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion's helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Postcards From the Edge
programme.desc: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet to save Walter's life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love
programme.desc: The new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides (Kyle MacLachlan) leads the fight for vital spice on a desert planet in the year 10191.

programme.title: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: A boy (Josh Hutcherson) and his new friend (AnnaSophia Robb), the class outsider, create an imaginary world in which they rule as king and queen.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: An alien soldier (James Caviezel) crashes on Earth during the time of the Vikings and blends his technology with theirs to hunt his enemy.

programme.title: Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Simon Sparrow begins medical school in London at St Swithin's Hospital, and moves into an apartment with roommates. A series of challenges and shenanigans takes place during their next five years at medical school.

programme.title: One Good Turn
programme.desc: A promise that an orphan will receive a model car leads to zany adventures.

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A group of students at an elite music school decide to share a flat in order to cut their living costs and have somewhere to practice together. They get into quite a few scraps and adventures, including impersonating a celebrity quintet.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young
programme.desc: Grammar school co-eds fight the establishment after their teacher is fired for buying instruments for the students.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Elijah Kane is prepping his team for court in Nicoli Putin's murder trial when they’re ambushed by Nicoli’s highly trained menout to stop Kane’s team from testifying.

programme.title: Let's Get Laid
programme.desc: A soldier returning from World War II gets mixed up in a series of murders and mistaken identies regarding a cigarette lighter that affects all electric power in this saucy comedy-thriller.

programme.title: JAG: Vanished
programme.desc: Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Fleas
programme.desc: Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to resolve a gas station robbery but discover it’s connected to a deadly crisis on a cult compound.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Colin directs a movie with "Jerry Springer Show" guests and in Bollywood style, then reports from a swamp full of frogs. Wayne and Gary sing songs of the spa. (S11, E08)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Top class guest performer Keegan-Michael Key joins Ryan in guzzling Italian food in a "gangstery" Helping Hands. Plus, the cast take a law-breaking beach stroll in Irish Drinking Song. (S3, E11)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha introduces another collection of unseen material from past series', incl. a crazy edition of "Party Quirks" and an action-packed flamenco scene with celebrity guest Marisol Nichols. (S12, E02)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Film star & comedian Tiffany Haddish is in the hot seat for some improv hilarity, performing a raucous rap duet with Wayne, and getting messy in "Helping Hands" with nervous boyfriend Ryan. (S12, E11)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Wayne goes masochistic in another bizarre edition of "Weird Newscasters" & famous TV scenes get a naked reimagining in "Scenes from a Hat". Guest is 'The Big Bang Theory' star Kunal Nayyar. (S2, E16)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Mini-Me is in the building! Aisha Tyler hosts as regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles, and Colin Mochrie are joined by guest performer Nyima Funk and star guest Verne Troyer. (S2, E03)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Hollywood director Colin oversees a slasher movie using Spring Break, Vegas entertainers & opera. Summer & Winter Olympic star Lolo Jones shows her versatility whilst being dubbed by Colin. (S3, E05)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Enjoy another dose of musical improv, as Glee star Darren Criss guests. We get treated to an unusual "Greatest Hits" compliation and a nightmare for our "Hollywood Director". (S2, E04)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Heather Anne Campbell and star guest Tony Hawk, skateboarding legend.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Jack Osbourne returns and salsa dances with Wayne. Ryan and Colin do an Infomercial on overcoming fears and Nyima joins the boys for an Irish Drinking Song on pregnancy. (S12, E07)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Scenes From a Hat'; ' Questions Only'; 'Superheroes'; 'World's Worst'; 'Props'; 'Scene to Music'.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thoroughbred
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: On a mission to top his first outing, Nolan pushes his team harder than ever. But when tragedy strikes, no one is prepared.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: So Long, My Son
programme.desc: Two married couples adjust to the vast social and economic changes taking place in China from the 1980s to the present.

programme.title: Insignificance
programme.desc: Four 1950s icons meet in the same hotel room and two of them discover more in common between them than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: Plan 75
programme.desc: Chie Hayakawa's thought-provoking drama, set in the near future, imagines a world where a country with a low birth rate and dwindling workforce takes drastic steps to alleviate the burden of its ageing population.

programme.title: 60 days in jail
programme.desc: 60 Days In Jail sends undercover volunteers into jails to expose the real stories of life inside. These harrowing journeys serve a higher purpose, helping those in charge improve conditions. Facing danger and loneliness, can they last?

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Let Them Eat Pretzels
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey find what should be a simple hit-and-run accident becomes deeply complicated when the son of a diplomat becomes involved. The team must figure out how to arrest the son, while the father attempts to stop them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gang's All There
programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Cry For Help
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are assigned to investigate a wife-beating case and discover that the victim's husband is a cop and former classmate of Lacey's. Meanwhile the team also has to find a way to charge a con man after they are forced to let him go.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Informant
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey run into an issue with their drug investigation when it turns out that their teenage informant is a perpetrator of the crimes himself. They are then faced with the dilemma of releasing a one criminal in order to arrest another.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Matinee
programme.desc: When a missing housewife turns up dead, her husband enlists the help of the 14th precinct to solve her murder. As Cagney and Lacey investigate, they discover that the woman is from Cagney's hometown, revealing a glimpse into Cagney's past.

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Series following members of the M-Sport WRC team about the trials and tribulations of competing in Rally driving at the highest level.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Relive the highlights of the FIA World Rally Championship, with summaries and analysis of the various stages of the competition.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Championship

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Out with the Old, In with the New
programme.desc: Nikki goes undercover to bust a straying lover.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: School of Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kim causes static at a local radio station.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Can Two Wrongs Make a Right?
programme.desc: A drunken party could cost Nikki a scholarship.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: She's Positive
programme.desc: T’s new girlfriend hides a devastating secret.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Olonzo approaches Maurice again. Gary becomes obsessed with reconciling with Andi. Tensions grow as Hayden threatens Zac. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Gary forces a conversation with Andi. Zac is pursued by a new love interest. Later, Gary gets drunk and his anger boils over. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 2
programme.desc: Most Haunted continues its investigation into the Judges Lodgings where the team seem to be under attack and something is trying to get through a door…but what?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 1
programme.desc: The team venture into a cottage where it is said ‘no living soul can endure living there’. With cursed dolls, murder and suicide this derelict place has everything to fear.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Children's Children
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Friends
programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher at a high school, Jonathan assigns an overweight girl to tutor a troubled baseball star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a youngster with Down's Syndrome to join the Special Olympics.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with Down's Syndrome. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: For the Love of Larry
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Birthday Party

programme.title: Dynasty: The Separation

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Blake must stand trial for the murder of Steven's lover; Krystle returns home to be with Blake. Fallon testified in her father's behalf but Steven refutes her statements in court.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Testimony
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Blake maintains his innocence; Matthew learns of Claudia's affair with Steven; Claudia and daughter Lindsay are involved in an automobile accident; The prosecution calls in a mysterious witness that Blake is surprised to see.

programme.title: Dynasty: Enter Alexis
programme.desc: Blake's first wife Alexis testifies that Blake is capable of violence; Matthew takes off with Lindsay; Alexis tells Steven of her love for him; the jury announces they have reached a verdict.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Verdict
programme.desc: Blake is found guilty; Krystle reunites with her husband; Blake strikes Steven; a pregnant Krystle suffers a fall; Alexis moves onto the Carrington estate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely? (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms. (S3, ep9)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Elixir
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Exchange
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Kieffer gets upset that Jenelle hung out with an old boyfriend while he was in jail and Leah gets the results of Ali's genetic testing. Also Kailyn gets into a car accident.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Making moves
programme.desc: Jenelle and Barb start fighting again so she decides to move in with her friend Tori. Meanwhile, Jo confronts Kailyn about filing for child support. Corey and Leah get some alarming news.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: The beginning of the end
programme.desc: Jenelle's downward spiral continues as she gets into a fight with Kieffer and her roommate Tori. Adam breaks up with Chelsea and she struggles to deal with it on her first day of work.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Love comes and goes
programme.desc: Kailyn's child support hearing is postponed. Jo finally meets her boyfriend Jordan for the first time. Jenelle has her day in court for the breaking and entering, and possession charges.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As her final step in getting her life together, Chelsea finds a GED class at a local college and takes her first practice test. Jenelle decides that rehab is the only way she'll stay clean.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey arranges visitation with the girls while Leah moves her stuff out of Corey's house. Jenelle finds out she might be bipolar while in rehab and Chelsea decides to take the GED.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1
programme.desc: We’ve got so much paternity action we can’t fit it all in one show. “You Are the Father” could be the sweetest words these men could ever hear. Will the results be make our guest cheer or tear?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?
programme.desc: Is Jesus the father of Laicie’s baby? Dusti says he’s gay and sex with Kayla was an “experiment”, but did he father her child? Is Rick or Jesse the father of Jolene’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!
programme.desc: Two steaming grandmothers want to sort out their children's paternity mystery. Then, Ben is sure that Angela's child is his. Teen mom Melissa wants Izzy to admit he's the dad and support her!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Samonia wants to mend her friendship with Leslie after criticizing her partners. Meanwhile, Kalondra left her husband Anthony due to lies, but he's trying to win her back. Karamo helps by unlocking both their phones to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband James says he's fighting for custody of his four children alleging his estranged wife, Jennifer, is controlled by a religious group. Jennifer developed an attachment to the ministry's leader, Doug Perry, of The Fellowship of the Martryrs (FOTM).

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1938, Nazi Germany annexed Austria. Hitler seized the Spear of Destiny, a Roman spearhead believed to hold power from Christ's crucifixion. He paraded it in Nuremberg to assert authority, but by 1945, amid Germany's ruin, the spear had vanished.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Armstrong, convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife, he was the first and only solicitor to be hung in UK. But was he guilty?

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Victorian double killer, the murderer of a young mother and baby - a woman named Mary Pearcey

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Schappert Identity

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem - Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Run Fugitive, Run
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket - Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Playing Possum
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.desc: Explore the travel challenges that alien spaceships face, and discover whether humans can tackle interstellar flight.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Zones: Journey to the world's hottest UFO zones, where physical and paranormal phenomenons and unidentified objects and aliens are reported with alarming frequency.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As humanity continues to search for alien life, experts give their analysis on how close we are to first contact.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the information obtained from people who have experienced alien abductions.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: New World Order
programme.desc: An elite group of power-brokers may be trying to rule the planet.

programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Time Travel
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: A Day of Infamy
programme.desc: December 7th, 1941 Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Empire of Japan. Now the people who were there share their memories of that fateful day.

programme.title: Stories from the Blitz
programme.desc: Stories from the Blitz features new interviews with those who were there and amazing archive footage of the devastation, and of human courage and sheer will to survive one of Britain's darkest periods in History.

programme.title: Boy Soldiers Of World War II
programme.desc: In Britain during World War Two, thousands of men over the age of 18 were conscripted into the army, but among them were hundreds of underage boys, some as young as 15, who lied about their age so that they could join up.

programme.title: Auschwitz Countdown To Liberation

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Democracy without Democrats 1929-1933

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Arthur: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. Baby Bop is not sure she likes this idea at first.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It’s Barney’s birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the "Super Fun Guy" movie set in Kazakstan in order to disable a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: An alien soldier (James Caviezel) crashes on Earth during the time of the Vikings and blends his technology with theirs to hunt his enemy.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: After the fall of Rome, its last emperor (Thomas Sangster), a 12-year-old boy, journeys to Britannia with his closest retainers (Colin Firth, Ben Kingsley) to find a fabled legion.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides (Kyle MacLachlan) leads the fight for vital spice on a desert planet in the year 10191.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young
programme.desc: Grammar school co-eds fight the establishment after their teacher is fired for buying instruments for the students.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: It's 1937 and Glasgow is in the grip of depression. James Herriot, fresh out of veterinary college, moves to the magnificent Yorkshire Dales for work, and soon discovers that treating the animals is as much about treating their owners.

programme.title: Geordie
programme.desc: Depicting the progress of a Scottish boy from young weakling into a strapping champion hammer thrower. Geordie is so good, in fact, that he's selected to throw the hammer for Britain at the Olympic Games in Australia.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Elijah Kane is prepping his team for court in Nicoli Putin's murder trial when they’re ambushed by Nicoli’s highly trained menout to stop Kane’s team from testifying.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Following the attack on his precinct, Kane buries his friends and sets his sights on avenging their deaths. He assembles a new team and follows the trail across the border to Vancouver.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Now in Vancouver, Kane joins forces with the CIA to take down a lawyer who had a hand in the attack on Kane’s precinct. The CIA wants the lawyer dead, and promises it will bring Kane one step closer to the man responsible for it all: The Ghost.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: The CIA asks Kane and his team to take down a high-level gang boss involved in human smuggling, but Kane’s investigation uncovers a larger conspiracy involving organ-trafficking.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler discovers a Croatian war criminal has been granted amnesty, and must struggle with demons from his own past in Bosnia.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Three American soldiers plunge into the Niagara River and swim to Canada. Deserters, refusing to return to Iraq under the U.S.’s “stop loss” policy, they seek refugee status in Canada.

programme.title: Let's Get Laid
programme.desc: A soldier returning from World War II gets mixed up in a series of murders and mistaken identies regarding a cigarette lighter that affects all electric power in this saucy comedy-thriller.

programme.title: Little Miss Innocence
programme.desc: Wealthy exec Rick Engels brings two young hitchhikers to his mansion for his desires. What starts as an ideal situation turns chaotic when the women refuse to leave and prove more than he can handle, spiraling into unexpected complications.

programme.title: The Alcove
programme.desc: In 1936, an Italian officer returning from the war in Ethiopia brings with him Zerbal, an African princess. Her presence disrupts the family's tranquility: jealousy, forbidden passions, and sexual tensions emerge in a game of power and desire.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A vigilante, out for blood, goes too far when he takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A shooter inside a historic arena leaves Sam questioning his place on the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Scenes From a Hat'; ' Questions Only'; 'Superheroes'; 'World's Worst'; 'Props'; 'Scene to Music'.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Karen Maruyama, Colin Mochrie, Greg Proops and Ryan Stiles are the ad-libbing masterminds.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Actor Keegan-Michael Key helps the cast with improv games: Questions With Wigs, Sideways Scene, Whats In The Bag, Scenes From A Hat, Helping Hands, Two Grandfather

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the audience's texts are used to inform the game "Mixed Messages", and Wayne is joined by his real daughter Maile for "Duet", discussing his annoying parental habits. (S12, E14)

programme.desc: 'Night of the Crumpet'; 'Film & Theater Styles'; 'World's Worst'; 'Remote Control.'
